## 🔍 SCIENTIFIC METHODOLOGY

### Selection Process
- **Method**: Deterministic positioning (2nd, 5th, 8th, 11th, 14th, 17th alphabetically)
- **Rationale**: Eliminates selection bias while ensuring reproducibility
- **Sample Size**: 6 out of 24 commands (25% coverage)

### Complexity Scoring (Based on CLAUDE.md rules)
```
Score = Direct Solution (1) + 
        New Classes (×2) + 
        Interfaces (×1) + 
        Design Patterns (×3) + 
        Config Files (×2)
```

### Success Probability Calculation
```
P(Success) = f(
    Cognitive Load,
    Time to Understand,
    Clarity of Purpose,
    Practical Utility
)
```
